newPick.name: Stealth 2 Driver
newPick.description: If you're looking to crush drives and turn heads, the TaylorMade Stealth 2 Driver is your go-to. With its innovative carbon face technology, you'll get more distance and forgiveness than ever before. It's a game-changer, plain and simple.
